name: navitaspet.com
message: Navitas Petroleum is a publicly traded (TASE:NVPT.L) North America focused, O&G exploration and production partnership. Navitas Petroleum has an established asset portfolio, including: conventional onshore production (Neches field), robust offshore production (Buckskin project), development stage assets (post-FID Shenandoah project) and high-impact exploration prospects (Block 7, offshore Canada).SITE: www.navitaspet.com Address  5847 San Felipe #2200 Houston, Texas 77057 UNITED STATES 713-955-7944 Ext 402FULL DATA SIZE: 330gb 1.
